questions.clue: "Dear King Philip claps often for good science" begins with this--all life can be divided into 3, including bacteria
Regarding a stroke, "FAST" means to check for drooping here, weakness in these & difficulty with this--then the "T" is for time

final.clue: At her funeral in 1936, it was said that "The touch of her hand... literally emancipated a soul"
